ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the project (e.g., Poetry, Narrative Film) */,
  "main_category" TEXT /* Main category of the project (e.g., Publishing, Film & Video) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the project (e.g., GBP, USD) */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the project */,
  "goal" REAL /* Funding goal of the project */,
  "launched" TEXT /* Date and time the project was launched */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the project's main image */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to the project's main video */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the project */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the project states table */,
  "funding_raised" REAL /* Total amount of funding raised so far */,
  "backer_count" INTEGER /* Number of backers for the project */,
  "faq" TEXT /* Frequently asked questions about the project */,
  "rewards" TEXT /* JSON field to store reward tiers and their details */,
  "tags" TEXT /* JSON field to store tags associated with the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_currency FOREIGN KEY ("currency") REFERENCES currencies ("code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES project_states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_main_category FOREIGN KEY ("main_category") REFERENCES main_categories ("main_category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the main categories table to establish a hierarchy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "main_categories" (
  "main_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each main category */,
  "main_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the main category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the main category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the main category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the main category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("main_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code of the currency (e.g., GBP, USD) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency (e.g., £, $) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the currency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the currency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "creators" (
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each creator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the creator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the creator */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the creator */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the creator */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the creator's profile image */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the creator's website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON field to store links to the creator's social media profiles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the creator account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the creator account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects_creators" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the creator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the creator in the project (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pledges" (
  "pledge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pledge */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the backer */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount pledged */,
  "pledged" TEXT /* Date the pledge was made */,
  "pledge_state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the pledge states table */,
  "reward_tier_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the reward tiers table */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* JSON field to store the backer's shipping address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pledge was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pledge was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pledge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_reward_tier_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_tier_id") REFERENCES reward_tiers ("reward_tier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_pledge_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("pledge_state_id") REFERENCES pledge_states ("pledge_state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_backer_id FOREIGN KEY ("backer_id") REFERENCES backers ("backer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backers" (
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the backer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the backer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the backer */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the backer's profile image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the backer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the backer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the state */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text of the update */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the creator who made the update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the update was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the update was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES creators ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pledge_states" (
  "pledge_state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pledge state */,
  "pledge_state_name" TEXT /* Name of the pledge state */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pledge state */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pledge_state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reward_tiers" (
  "reward_tier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward tier */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "tier_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward tier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reward tier */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount required for the reward tier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reward tier was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reward tier was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_tier_id")
)
